display_name:
Kling Image O1 image generation and image editing bot. Send up to 10 images to use as a reference, and refer to each image with $image1, $image2, etc. in the prompt to specify interactions. 

Optional
description:
Kling Image O1 image generation and image editing bot. Send up to 10 images to use as a reference, and refer to each image with $image1, $image2, etc. in the prompt to specify interactions. 

Optional parameters:
Set aspect ratio. Select from (21:9, 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16). It is set to 16:9 aspect ratio as default.
Set Resolution. Select from (1K, 2K). It is set to 1K resolution as default.

Notes:
Supports jpeg, png, heic, webp images.
